title: WOS Prescription
description: Formal schema for the 7-section prescription format produced by the Steward and consumed by the Executor in the Lobster Work Orchestration System (WOS) pipeline. Schema version 1.0.0.

diagnosis.description: What the Steward observed that prompted this prescription — the upstream signal that triggered the prescribe branch.

signal.description: One-sentence summary of the triggering observation.

reentry_posture.description: The executor reentry posture assigned by _diagnose_uow().

completion_gap.description: Human-readable rationale for why the UoW is not yet done. Empty string on first_execution.

executor_outcome.description: The outcome field from the Executor's result.json if present; null on first execution or when no result file exists.

prior_cycle_count.description: steward_cycles value at the time this prescription was produced. Zero on first execution.

prescription.description: The Steward's core recommendation: what to do and why, distilled from the diagnosis.

summary.description: One-to-two sentence statement of the work to be done in this cycle.

instructions.description: Complete, actionable natural-language instructions for the Executor.

estimated_cycles.description: Steward estimate of how many Executor passes this prescription requires.

minimum_viable_output.description: The single concrete deliverable that defines the floor for this cycle.

boundary.description: The primary scope exclusion the Executor must not cross.

workflow.description: The execution plan: agent type, ordered steps, and optional fan-out for multi-perspective workflows.

agent_type.description: The Executor dispatch type that will process this prescription.

steps.description: Ordered list of execution steps; each is one imperative sentence.

agent_type.description: Executor type for this parallel branch.

focus.description: One sentence describing what this branch investigates or produces.

task_id_suffix.description: Optional suffix appended to the UoW task_id for this branch.

oneOf.description: Parallel Executor agents for multi-perspective workflows.

fan_out.description: Fan-out configuration for multi-perspective workflows. Null or absent for single-agent workflows.

constraints.description: Hard limits the Executor must not violate: scope exclusions, protected files, and authority boundaries.

boundary.description: Primary scope exclusion. Authoritative location for all 'do not' rules.

no_modify.description: Files, modules, tables, or systems the Executor must not touch.

no_deploy.description: If true, the Executor must not push to remote, merge PRs, or modify production infrastructure. Defaults to false.

max_cycles.description: Override for maximum Executor passes before the Steward surfaces to Dan.

success_criteria.description: Verifiable conditions the Steward evaluates to determine whether the UoW is done.

check.description: Human-readable description of the verification method.

artifacts.description: Absolute paths or glob patterns of files that must exist and be non-empty after execution.

commands.description: Shell commands the Steward or reviewer may run to verify completion.

gate_command.description: For iterative-convergent register UoWs: the canonical gate command whose score the Executor reports in trace.json. Null for all other registers.

dan_context.description: Human-facing context orienting the user to this UoW within its broader initiative. All fields are freeform prose.

orientation.description: One or two sentences placing this UoW in its broader initiative context.

priority_signal.description: Why this UoW matters now — the urgency or dependency signal.

open_questions.description: Questions the Executor cannot resolve that may require Dan's input.

load_bearing_assumption.description: The single most important assumption this prescription rests on.

audit_metadata.description: Machine-readable tracking fields correlating this prescription with its UoW, cycle history, and schema version.

uow_id.description: The UoW ID this prescription belongs to. Must match the UoW record's id field.

cycle.description: Steward cycle number at prescription time. Zero-indexed; must equal diagnosis.prior_cycle_count.

executor_posture.description: The execution posture this prescription targets, derived from reentry classification.

schema_version.description: Semver string identifying the prescription format version. Current: 1.0.0.

prescribed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this prescription was produced.

prescribed_skills.description: Skill identifiers to activate before dispatching the Executor.
